page2_adoptionText: Was the applicant adopted in to the family?
page2_adoptedOutText: Was the applicant adopted out of the family?
page2_adoptionPlaceText: Did the adoption take place in England or Wales?
page2_spouseRenouncedText: Is there a living spouse or civil partner who is renouncing their right to apply now and in the future?
grandchild_parent_deceasedText: Is one of the applicant’s parents a deceased child of the deceased?
grandchild_parent_adoptionText: Did the deceased legally adopt the applicant’s parent?
grandchild_parent_adoptedOutText: Did the deceased legally adopt the applicant’s parent out of the family?
surviving_children_grandchildrenText: Are there any living children, grandchildren or great-grandchildren of the deceased?
surviving_wholeBloodSiblings_Text: Are there any living whole blood siblings of the deceased?
surviving_parentsText: Are there any living parents of the deceased?
niece_surviving_parentsText: Is one of the applicant’s parents a deceased whole blood sibling of the deceased?
halfNiece_surviving_parentsText: Is one of the applicant’s parents a deceased half blood sibling of the deceased?
siblingType_Text: Did the applicant share both the same parents as the deceased?
deceased_adoptionText: Was the deceased adopted in to the family?
page4_waitForText: Close and Return to case details
